top_signals.title: Kokusai Electric Shares Decline as KKR Sells All Its Stake
top_signals.summary: Kokusai Electric Corp. shares dropped after saying its biggest holder KKR & Co. is offloading its entire stake in the Japanese supplier of chipmaking gear.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
